requirements.summary: Change the Turkish (tr) localized subtitle/tagline string to the requested new wording without impacting other languages.
acceptanceCriteria: In `frontend/src/lib/translations.ts`, `translations.tr.subtitle` equals exactly: "Ses frekansları ile huzuru keşfedin".
When the app language is set to Turkish, the header subtitle renders as "Ses frekansları ile huzuru keşfedin".
No other language subtitles are changed.

file_operations.description: Update only `translations.tr.subtitle` from "Ses frekansları ile şifayı keşfedin" to "Ses frekansları ile huzuru keşfedin", leaving all other translation entries unchanged.
